name: @aristotle/kms-keyring
description: KMS-backed keyring for AristotleOS Warrant signing. Defines KmsKeyring + KmsKeyHandle interfaces that abstract away where the private key actually lives (in-memory, AWS KMS, Vault Transit, Azure Key Vault, GCP KMS, HashiCorp HSM, ...) and produces AristotleSigner instances the gate already consumes. Ships InMemoryKmsKeyring (full impl) + AwsKmsKeyring / VaultKeyring stubs documenting the bind point.
